parameters.query: INSERT INTO webhook_payloads (source, raw_payload, received_at) VALUES ('jobtread', $1::jsonb, NOW()) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO leads (jobtread_id, name, phone, phone_e164, email, service_type, source, status, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, 'new', NOW()) RETURNING id, name, phone_e164, service_type
SELECT sms_opted_out FROM leads WHERE id = $1
UPDATE leads SET sms_sent_at = NOW(), status = 'contacted' WHERE id = $1
SELECT id, name, phone_e164, service_type, sms_opted_out FROM leads WHERE id = $1
UPDATE leads SET sms_sent_at = NOW(), status = 'contacted' WHERE id = $1
SELECT id, name, phone_e164, service_type, responded_at, sms_opted_out, followup_sent_at FROM leads WHERE id = $1
UPDATE leads SET followup_sent_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
INSERT INTO processing_errors (workflow_name, node_name, error_message, raw_payload, failed_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, NOW())
INSERT INTO webhook_payloads (source, raw_payload, received_at) VALUES ('jobtread', $1::jsonb, NOW()) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO leads (jobtread_id, name, phone, phone_e164, email, service_type, source, status, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, 'new', NOW()) RETURNING id, name, phone_e164, service_type
SELECT sms_opted_out FROM leads WHERE id = $1
UPDATE leads SET sms_sent_at = NOW(), status = 'contacted' WHERE id = $1
SELECT id, name, phone_e164, service_type, sms_opted_out FROM leads WHERE id = $1
UPDATE leads SET sms_sent_at = NOW(), status = 'contacted' WHERE id = $1
SELECT id, name, phone_e164, service_type, responded_at, sms_opted_out, followup_sent_at FROM leads WHERE id = $1
UPDATE leads SET followup_sent_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
INSERT INTO processing_errors (workflow_name, node_name, error_message, raw_payload, failed_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, NOW())
